MeasurementToolMetadata.Instructions: On this questionnaire are groups of statements. Read each group and select the one statement that best describes the way you have been feeling in the past week, including today.
MeasurementToolMetadata.LongName: 21-item self-report of depressive symptoms over the past week. Each item presents four statements scored 0-3. Item bdi_19a is an auxiliary Yes/No item (intentional weight loss) and is not part of the total.

bdi_1.Description: Beck Depression Inventory (BDI-IA) item 1: respondent selects the statement that best describes how they have felt in the past week, including today (see Levels).

Levels.0: I do not feel sad.
Levels.1: I feel sad.
Levels.2: I am sad all the time and I can't snap out of it.
Levels.3: I am so sad or unhappy that I can't stand it.

bdi_2.Description: Beck Depression Inventory (BDI-IA) item 2: respondent selects the statement that best describes how they have felt in the past week, including today (see Levels).

Levels.0: I am not particularly discouraged about the future.
Levels.1: I feel discouraged about the future.
Levels.2: I feel I have nothing to look forward to.
Levels.3: I feel that the future is hopeless and that things cannot improve.

bdi_3.Description: Beck Depression Inventory (BDI-IA) item 3: respondent selects the statement that best describes how they have felt in the past week, including today (see Levels).

Levels.0: I do not feel like a failure.
Levels.1: I feel I have failed more than the average person.
Levels.2: As I look back on my life, all I can see is a lot of failures.
Levels.3: I feel I am a complete failure as a person.

bdi_4.Description: Beck Depression Inventory (BDI-IA) item 4: respondent selects the statement that best describes how they have felt in the past week, including today (see Levels).

Levels.0: I get as much satisfaction out of things as I used to.
Levels.1: I don't enjoy things the way I used to.
Levels.2: I don't get real satisfaction out of anything anymore.
Levels.3: I am dissatisfied or bored with everything.

bdi_5.Description: Beck Depression Inventory (BDI-IA) item 5: respondent selects the statement that best describes how they have felt in the past week, including today (see Levels).

Levels.0: I don't feel particularly guilty.
Levels.1: I feel guilty a good part of the time.
Levels.2: I feel quite guilty most of the time.
Levels.3: I feel guilty all of the time.

bdi_6.Description: Beck Depression Inventory (BDI-IA) item 6: respondent selects the statement that best describes how they have felt in the past week, including today (see Levels).

Levels.0: I don't feel I am being punished.
Levels.1: I feel I may be punished.
Levels.2: I expect to be punished.
Levels.3: I feel I am being punished.

bdi_7.Description: Beck Depression Inventory (BDI-IA) item 7: respondent selects the statement that best describes how they have felt in the past week, including today (see Levels).

Levels.0: I don't feel disappointed in myself.
Levels.1: I am disappointed in myself.
Levels.2: I am disgusted with myself.
Levels.3: I hate myself.

bdi_8.Description: Beck Depression Inventory (BDI-IA) item 8: respondent selects the statement that best describes how they have felt in the past week, including today (see Levels).

Levels.0: I don't feel I am any worse than anybody else.
Levels.1: I am critical of myself for my weaknesses and mistakes.
Levels.2: I blame myself all the time for my faults.
Levels.3: I blame myself for everything bad that happens.

bdi_9.Description: Beck Depression Inventory (BDI-IA) item 9: respondent selects the statement that best describes how they have felt in the past week, including today (see Levels).

Levels.0: I don't have any thoughts of killing myself.
Levels.1: I have thoughts of killing myself, but I would not carry them out.
Levels.2: I would like to kill myself.
Levels.3: I would kill myself if I had the chance.

bdi_10.Description: Beck Depression Inventory (BDI-IA) item 10: respondent selects the statement that best describes how they have felt in the past week, including today (see Levels).

Levels.0: I don't cry any more than usual.
Levels.1: I cry more now than I used to.
Levels.2: I cry all the time now.
Levels.3: I used to be able to cry, but now I can't even though I want to.

bdi_11.Description: Beck Depression Inventory (BDI-IA) item 11: respondent selects the statement that best describes how they have felt in the past week, including today (see Levels).

Levels.0: I am no more irritated now than I ever am.
Levels.1: I get annoyed or irritated more easily than I used to.
Levels.2: I feel irritated all the time now.
Levels.3: I don't get irritated at all by the things that used to irritate me.

bdi_12.Description: Beck Depression Inventory (BDI-IA) item 12: respondent selects the statement that best describes how they have felt in the past week, including today (see Levels).

Levels.0: I have not lost interest in other people.
Levels.1: I am less interested in other people than I used to be.
Levels.2: I have lost most of my interest in other people.
Levels.3: I have lost all of my interest in other people.

bdi_13.Description: Beck Depression Inventory (BDI-IA) item 13: respondent selects the statement that best describes how they have felt in the past week, including today (see Levels).

Levels.0: I make decisions as well as I ever could.
Levels.1: I put off making decisions more than I used to.
Levels.2: I have greater difficulty in making decisions than before.
Levels.3: I can't make decisions at all any more.

bdi_14.Description: Beck Depression Inventory (BDI-IA) item 14: respondent selects the statement that best describes how they have felt in the past week, including today (see Levels).

Levels.0: I don't feel I look any worse than I used to.
Levels.1: I am worried that I am looking old or unattractive.
Levels.2: I feel that there are permanent changes in my appearance that make me look unattractive.
Levels.3: I believe that I look ugly.

bdi_15.Description: Beck Depression Inventory (BDI-IA) item 15: respondent selects the statement that best describes how they have felt in the past week, including today (see Levels).

Levels.0: I can work about as well as before.
Levels.1: It takes an extra effort to get started at doing something.
Levels.2: I have to push myself very hard to do anything.
Levels.3: I can't do any work at all anymore.

bdi_16.Description: Beck Depression Inventory (BDI-IA) item 16: respondent selects the statement that best describes how they have felt in the past week, including today (see Levels).

Levels.0: I can sleep as well as usual.
Levels.1: I don't sleep as well as I used to.
Levels.2: I wake up 1-2 hours earlier than usual and find it hard to get back to sleep.
Levels.3: I wake up several hours earlier than I used to and cannot get back to sleep.

bdi_17.Description: Beck Depression Inventory (BDI-IA) item 17: respondent selects the statement that best describes how they have felt in the past week, including today (see Levels).

Levels.0: I don't get more tired than usual.
Levels.1: I get tired more easily than I used to.
Levels.2: I get tired from doing almost anything.
Levels.3: I am too tired to do anything.

bdi_18.Description: Beck Depression Inventory (BDI-IA) item 18: respondent selects the statement that best describes how they have felt in the past week, including today (see Levels).

Levels.0: My appetite is no worse than usual.
Levels.1: My appetite is not as good as it used to be.
Levels.2: My appetite is much worse now.
Levels.3: I have no appetite at all anymore.

bdi_19.Description: Beck Depression Inventory (BDI-IA) item 19: respondent selects the statement that best describes how they have felt in the past week, including today (see Levels).

Levels.0: I haven't lost much weight, if any, lately.
Levels.1: I have lost more than 5 pounds.
Levels.2: I have lost more than 10 pounds.
Levels.3: I have lost more than 15 pounds.

bdi_19a.Description: I am purposely trying to lose weight.

Levels.1: Yes
Levels.0: No

bdi_20.Description: Beck Depression Inventory (BDI-IA) item 20: respondent selects the statement that best describes how they have felt in the past week, including today (see Levels).

Levels.0: I am no more worried about my health than usual.
Levels.1: I am worried about physical problems such as aches or pains, upset stomachs, or constipation.
Levels.2: I am very worried about physical problems and it's hard to think of much else.
Levels.3: I am so worried about my physical problems that I cannot think about anything else.

bdi_21.Description: Beck Depression Inventory (BDI-IA) item 21: respondent selects the statement that best describes how they have felt in the past week, including today (see Levels).

Levels.0: I have not noticed any recent changes in my interest in sex.
Levels.1: I am less interested in sex than I used to be.
Levels.2: I am much less interested in sex now.
Levels.3: I have lost interest in sex completely.

bdi_score_total.Description: BDI-IA total score: sum of items bdi_1-bdi_21 (each 0-3; bdi_19a is excluded). Range 0-63. n/a if any of items 1-21 is missing. Note: GRMPY administered items 9 (suicidality) and 21 (sex) which are retained here.
